title: Galatella cana
taxonomy: Galatella cana is a member of the Asteraceae family, which is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. This family is commonly known as the sunflower or aster family. Galatella cana is a genus of flowering plants that is native to Europe and Asia. The genus is often classified as a group of small to medium-sized shrubs or perennials, often with white or pink flowers. Galatella cana is closely related to other genera such as Gnaphalium and Echinops.
